captions.text: Welcome, Dr. Hala.
This is your new admin dashboard.
In the next few minutes, I'll walk you through everything you need to run your practice from here.
Go to mamahala.ca/admin to sign in
Enter your password
Check 'Remember me' on your own device

title: Bookings — The Heart of Your Day

captions.text: Bookings is where your day starts
Three tabs: Booking Requests, Recurring, Availability
New requests appear in Pending
Click Approve to confirm — an email is sent automatically
Click Decline to gently turn down a request
Tap New Booking to add a client manually
Availability controls when clients can book you
Schedule — set your weekly hours
Blocked Dates — vacations, days off, holidays
Travel — trip locations adjust your timezone
Rules — notice, buffers, max sessions per day
Dashboard — revenue and insights at a glance
Compose — create a new invoice
Pick a customer and service — price fills in automatically
Adjust for complexity, packages, or sliding scale
Use the voice recorder — AI writes the description
Preview, then Send — payment link included
History — mark paid, resend, or download PDF
Dashboard — real-time view of your practice
Leads, toolkit downloads, newsletter signups
Clients — every lead tagged Hot, Warm, or Cold
Click any row to see their journey on your site
Blog, Services, Testimonials, FAQs, Resources
Each is its own dedicated section
English and Arabic — Translate button handles the rest
Photos, prices, toolkits — all in a few clicks
Settings — your business info, stats, social, pricing
Everything on your website reflects what you save here
You're ready to run Mama Hala Consulting from one place
Welcome to your new command center.
